analysis.reasoning: Core message: A personal/protocol tweet about a farewell lunch in Washington, D.C., attended by former US Ambassador to the EU and Belgium and various diplomats, noting a socially distanced but warm gathering. Evaluation against narratives: EU1 (EU as a successful story) – Not supported; the tweet does not reference EU achievements, history, or learning from past challenges. EU2 (EU is united) – Not supported; no mention of EU unity or collective decision-making, just attendance by EU/Belgian representatives. EU3 (EU useful for citizens) – Not supported; no policies or citizen benefits are discussed. EU4 (EU avant-garde actor) – Not supported; no policy leadership or pioneering action is mentioned. EU5 (EU as global champion of fair causes) – Not supported; no human rights or fair-cause themes. EU6 (EU contributes to a better world) – Not supported; while it shows routine diplomatic engagement, it does not articulate contributions to global cooperation or multilateralism. Conclusion: No listed strategic narratives are promoted.
